news.t: REX Shares Announces Transition to Weekly Distributions for FEPI, AIPI, and CEPI
Don't Go Into The Next Market Crash Without These 7%+ Dividends
Seeking a 20%+ Dividend Yield? Check Out the FEPI ETF (NASDAQ:FEPI)
REX Shares Launches FEPI for Investors Seeking Big Tech Exposure and High Income Potential

holdings.infoBox: FEPI is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 9.05%, Advanced Micro Devices at 8.01%, Intel at 7.22%, AppLovin at 6.97%, and Oracle at 6.82%.

overview.description: The REX FANG & Innovation Equity Premium Income ETF (FEPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking to provide similar returns as the Solactive FANG Innovation Index and monthly income. The fund invests in the securities comprising the index while writing call options on them. FEPI was launched on Oct 9, 2023 and is issued by REX Shares.
